name: the-local
description: The Local -- self-hosted Matrix network for the workplace democracy movement. Operational knowledge, Element Web branding, Synapse configuration, and deployment workflow.

skills.name: Element Branding
skills.description: Element Web branding including custom CSS injection, welcome page customization, and auth page styling

skills.name: Server Ops
skills.description: Operational knowledge for The Local's self-hosted Matrix infrastructure on DigitalOcean

skills.name: Synapse Config
skills.description: Synapse Matrix homeserver configuration, email setup via Resend, and Jinja2 template system

commands.name: Create User
commands.description: Create a new Matrix user account on The Local

commands.name: Deploy
commands.description: Deploy changed files to The Local production server

commands.name: Logs
commands.description: Tail Docker Compose logs for The Local services
